function.name: sonia_build_agent_dispatch
function.description: Submit a structured build or schema-generation intent to the Sonia build daemon. Never invoke raw shell commands.

method.description: cargo_check for fast diagnostics, cargo_build for full builds, generate_schemas for schema regeneration.

profile.description: Build profile; defaults to 'check' if omitted.

output_dir.description: For generate_schemas: directory for emitted schema files.

intent_id.description: Stable ID for correlating request and events.

session_id.description: Optional SessionProfile.id used for invariant checks.
